Military personnel are usually either officers enlisted: Officers must usually attend an acad- emy Or other institute of higher learning to obtain commission: Enlisted personnel are the backbonc of an Organization and make up the bulk of each military force. Some specialized personnel; such as MechWarriors and technicians; can hold positions between tne two standard cate gories_ Some may not have received forma officer training but nave unique skills that warrant nigher initia grade than the enlisted ranks normally allow Depending on the organization; these personnel usually nold rank comparable t0 the lowest officer Or t0 sergeant. The following paragraphs Iist common ranks among military units Naval ranks appear in parentheses. Though these ranks do not always translate directly into comparable rank in anoth- military, they provide rough comparison.
